title: Clash Royale Spear
description: This resourcepack changes the Netherite Spear to the Lance of the Prince from Clash Royale.
body:
![Title](https://i.postimg.cc/cLYwFY4T/kodawkopadwkpowdakpoawd.png)

## 📖 Description

This resourcepack changes the Netherite Spear from the snapshot 25W41A to the Lance of the Prince from Clash Royale.

The changes are visual and auditive, custom 3D Model and sounds directly from the game.


<details>
<summary>Note</summary>

Other spears will have the custom sounds except for the Wooden Spear.

</details>
